text.title: LLM Observability and Monitoring — Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing `llm-observability` applied to a real-shape scenario.

section.title: Worked example: Langfuse self-host for agent stack
section.p: EU SaaS support agent built on LangGraph + OpenAI. Daily eval probes + cost watch.

list.item: Trace coverage: 100%. langfuse_handler wired into create_react_agent.
Cost: 38 calls/min average, p95 cost $0.0012/call; daily_multiplier alert at 2x triggered on 2026-03-14 (retry storm fixed).
Eval: 200-probe set, daily 09:00 UTC; accuracy metric on Prometheus.
Alerts: cost daily_2x, p95 latency 2x, accuracy drop >5pp.
PII: client-side redaction (emails / phone / ID) before trace export.
